articles.title: Rupee to average around 96/USD in FY27; risks from oil, dollar persist: Motilal Oswal
articles.description: The rupee is likely to average around 96/USD in FY27, however, the outlook remains subject to key downside risks, including potential US dollar appreciation and a rate hike scenario, geopolitical developments, and movements in crude oil prices, according to a report by brokerage house Motilal Oswal.

articles.title: Equity mutual fund inflows fall to 1 year low in May; SIP contributions stay above ₹30,900 crore
articles.description: Equity mutual fund inflows dropped to a one-year low in May 2026 as geopolitical tensions and elevated crude oil prices prompted investors to turn cautious. Despite the moderation, SIP contributions stayed above ₹30,900 crore, highlighting the resilience of long-term retail participation.

articles.title: BYD’s DM-i technology explained: EV driving, petrol backup, 1,200km range
articles.description: Cars News: BYD India has just introduced its DM-i (Dual Mode Intelligent) technology in India, bringing its globally established plug-in hybrid system to the mar.

articles.title: Why is market rising? Sensex jumps 1,000 points in 2 days, Nifty crosses 23,400. 3 key factors behind the surge
articles.description: Indian stock markets surged for a second consecutive session, with Sensex and Nifty crossing significant milestones. This resilience occurred despite escalating Iran-US tensions, as cooling oil prices and a fizzling AI rally in global markets provided support. Key sectors like FMCG and Private Banks led the gains.

articles.title: Gold prices drop amid US-Iran hostilities
articles.description: Explore how gold prices are affected by rising oil prices and renewed US-Iran hostilities, with insights on market adjustments and inflation concerns. Read more at straitstimes.com.

articles.title: This Electric Scooter Has A 141 km/h Top Speed - Faster Than Your Escape Plan From Work
articles.description: Electric scooters have evolved, and now they offer impressive speed and performance, often outpacing traditional petrol vehicles. Here's a closer look at Ola S1 Pro+ Gen 3, featuring a 5.2kWh battery that can be an ideal option for people searching a faster electric scooter., Electric Vehicles, Times Now

articles.title: Left parties block NH in Vijayawada over fuel, gas price hikes
articles.description: Left activists blocked the National Highway at Krishnalanka in Vijayawada on June 9, halting traffic for 30 minutes over rising petrol, diesel and LPG prices.

articles.title: Euro Zone Bonds Hold Steady Amid Geopolitical Tensions and Inflation Watch
articles.description: Euro zone bond yields slightly decreased due to muted reaction in oil prices despite U.S.-Iran tensions. Traders focused on upcoming U.S. inflation data and ECB's anticipated interest rate hike. Geopolitical strains have maintained high yields, with markets anticipating further rate increases by the ECB and Federal Reserve.

articles.title: Asian shares fall after a tech sell-off on Wall Street, while oil prices stabilize
articles.description: Asian shares have mostly retreated and oil prices rose and then fell back after the U.S. launched fresh airstrikes against Iran, raising questions again over prospects for a permanent end to the war

articles.title: Oil Prices: Fitch sees Crude slipping to $70 by September if Strait of Hormuz opens in July
articles.description: Brent crude prices have fluctuated due to the Middle East crisis, but Fitch Ratings expects global oil prices to decline to an average of $87 per barrel in 2026 once the Strait of Hormuz reopens. Market oversupply could drive prices lower by late 2026.
